nasb.text: So Joab’s men went out after him, along with the Cherethites and the Pelethites and all the mighty men; and they went out from Jerusalem to pursue Sheba the son of Bichri.

esv.text: And there went out after him Joab’s men and the Cherethites and the Pelethites, and all the mighty men. They went out from Jerusalem to pursue Sheba the son of Bichri.

cnv.text: 於是約押的人，基利提人、比利提人和所有的勇士，都跟隨亞比篩出去。他們從耶路撒冷出去，追趕比基利的兒子示巴。

ccb.text: 于是，约押的部下和基利提人、比利提人以及所有的勇士都跟随亚比筛离开耶路撒冷，去追赶比基利的儿子示巴。
